children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is hereby established within the Department of Justice, under the general authority of the Attorney General, an Office on Violence Against Women (in this subchapter referred to as the “Office”).

children.heading: Separate office
children.label: b Separate office
children.text: The Office shall be a separate and distinct office within the Department of Justice, not subsumed by any other office, headed by a Director, who shall report to the Attorney General and serve as Counsel to the Attorney General on the subject of violence against women, and who shall have final authority over all grants, cooperative agreements, and contracts awarded by the Office.
shall have sole jurisdiction over all duties and functions described in ; andsection 10444 of this title

children.label: A
